content: NODE_V8_COVERAGE=<dir> causes V8 to write coverage JSON files on process exit. c8 reads these files to generate reports. For subprocess coverage: each spawned node process writes its own coverage JSON to NODE_V8_COVERAGE dir if the env var is inherited. Test helpers (helpers.mjs) must be modified to forward process.env.NODE_V8_COVERAGE to execFileSync/spawnSync options.env. c8 then merges all JSON files in the dir. This is the correct approach for full coverage but requires touching test infrastructure.
